raw_consumer_statement:
I have invested a significant amount of time on the phone with my credit card company ( Citi ) disputing fraudulent charges on my card/account. I initially booked a car rental through XXXX for a total amount of {$54.00}. However, the car rental company charged my credit card a security deposit of {$460.00}, which was supposed to be refunded upon the return of the vehicle. After 72 hours, I contacted the rental car company for confirmation and was informed that their policy allows for a refund within 21 days after the vehicle is returned. 

It has now been over XXXX months, and I have yet to receive a refund of {$410.00}. I have made several attempts to contact the merchant to resolve this issue. Additionally, my experience with my credit card company " Citi '' has been frustrating. They have handled this matter with a lack of urgency, proving inconsistent information and, on several occasions, transferring me to the wrong department or disconnecting the call. I have spent countless hours trying to resolve this issue with my credit card bank " Citi '', a company that is expected to protect its customers. This entire experience has been exceedingly distressing.
